page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.24xlarge is a general-purpose server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor operating at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The instance provides 96 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading.

The hardware configuration includes 384.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio with 4.0 GB of memory per core. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, meaning storage requirements must be met via network-attached options. Network performance is supported by an 80 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high network bandwidth provide predictable compute resources for enterprise workloads. The absence of bundled local storage and GPUs reduces overhead for workloads that rely on external storage arrays or do not require hardware acceleration. This profile is suitable for multi-threaded enterprise applications, web serving, and database workloads requiring high network throughput and dedicated CPU execution.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.24xlarge is a general-purpose server instance utilizing the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at 3.3 GHz, it delivers 96 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation. The system is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, maintaining a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 80 Gbps but does not include local storage or GPU hardware. This resource profile is designed for enterprise workloads, web serving, and database applications requiring high network throughput and dedicated compute resources without the need for local disk storage or graphics acceleration.

tagline: A dedicated ninety-six core Intel Xeon instance with balanced memory and high-speed network bandwidth for demanding enterprise workloads.

384.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
80 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
Dedicated CPU allocation with a single thread per core under KVM virtualization
